name: Kremp Table Lamp W/ USB Port - 23 Inch Height - TBL4409 - Grey - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the stylish KREMP table lamp, a modern addition to any room with its sleek grey finish. Standing at 23 inches, this resin-crafted beauty blends functionality with flair. Featuring a convenient USB port, the lamp is perfect for charging your devices, merging practicality with contemporary design. The ceramic material adds a touch of elegance, complementing any decor from classic to minimalist. The KREMP table lamp not only brightens your surroundings but also adds a sophisticated touch to your home or office space. Transform your environment with this chic and versatile lighting solution. Whether placed on a nightstand or an office desk, this lamp is designed to meet both aesthetic and functional needs, enhancing your daily routine with ease and style.
